creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Probably a transient error. I just fetched the file from the official download url (http://static.rust-lang.org/dist/rustc-1.9.0-i686-unknown-freebsd.tar.gz) without any issue.

As to why rust-1.9.0 is needed to build 1.10.0: That's just the way bootstrapping rust works: https://github.com/rust-lang/rust/pull/32942

no patch required, therefore merge quarterly not needed. Closing this issue.
